IPv4 Network
------------
Local IP address............................192.168.1.4
Subnetmask..................................255.255.255.0
Gateway address.............................192.168.1.254
Burned in MAC address.......................64:60:38:3f:4a:a1
Protocol....................................none
Management VLAN ID..........................1
Management VLAN priority....................0
Management IP-DSCP value....................0
DHCP/BOOTP client ID........................
DHCP/BOOTP client config load...............enabled(options 4, 42, 66, 67)
